font_families.heading: 'Cabinet Grotesk', sans-serif
font_families.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

auth.layout: Grid split layout: lg:grid-cols-2. Left side form centered, right side image cover.
auth.inputs: Flat white background, no outer border, rounded-xl, high padding (px-4 py-3). focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C85A47]

sidebar.style: bg-[#F0EBE1] border-r border-[#E5E0D8]. Cardless list items.
sidebar.search_bar: Rounded-full, bg-white/60 focus-within:bg-white, with search icon on left. px-4 py-2 text-sm
sidebar.chat_item: Flex row, p-4, hover:bg-white/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer rounded-2xl mx-2
sidebar.unread_badge: bg-[#C85A47] text-white text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

chat_window.header: Flex justify-between items-center p-6 border-b border-[#E5E0D8] bg-[#F9F8F6]/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-10
chat_window.message_feed: Flex flex-col gap-6 p-6 overflow-y-auto bg-[#F9F8F6]
chat_window.bubble_sent: bg-[#38423B] text-[#F9F8F6] rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm px-5 py-3 max-w-[75%] shadow-sm
chat_window.bubble_received: bg-[#FFFFFF] text-[#1C1C1A] border border-[#E5E0D8] rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-5 py-3 max-w-[75%] shadow-sm
chat_window.input_container: flex items-center gap-3 bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5E0D8] p-2 rounded-full shadow-sm

video_call.modal_overlay: Fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[#1C1C1A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col p-6
video_call.grid: Bento-style: Main speaker spans most width, others in sidebar. Grid gap-4.
video_call.controls: Floating pill at bottom center: flex gap-4 bg-[#1C1C1A]/90 p-4 rounded-full backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10

motion.message_enter: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
motion.modal_enter: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for elegance.

accessibility.testing_ids: Mandatory data-testid on all interactive elements. Example: 'login-button', 'chat-item-username', 'video-call-button', 'message-input', 'send-message-button'

auth_background.description: Abstract terracotta and architectural shapes for the login split screen.

empty_state.description: Minimalist zen building and water reflection for 'No chats' state.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Implement the fonts via Fontshare CDN.
For the video call screen, use conditional rendering with a backdrop blur over the chat interface.
Ensure 'Cabinet Grotesk' is applied to headings and 'Satoshi' for the body text.
Implement real-time indicators like the 'Active now' status dot using the provided Sage Green color (#788A6F).
Use the specific media URLs provided for the auth background, avatars, and empty states. Do not use generic placeholders.

The UI follows the 'Organic & Earthy' (Archetype 1) theme which avoids the typical 'tech blue' or 'whatsapp green' for an architectural, warm, premium look. Respect the specific spacing and 1px border guidelines to maintain the high-end feel.
All components must be functional. Add 'data-testid' attributes like 'data-testid="login-form-submit-button"' to all interactive elements.
